title: Infinex account is live: one passkey, every chain
deployed_facts: The Infinex account is live for all users
A single passkey controls the account across every supported chain
There are no seed phrases to write down
The account is non-custodial; users hold their own keys via passkey
Recovery is handled through passkey providers, not paper backups
headline: One account. One passkey. Every chain.
tier_reason: First-time public availability of the account primitive that the rest of the product sits on. Everything Infinex ships afterward inherits from this moment. Reserved-template worthy because the category — non-custodial account without seed phrases — is the structural bet, not a feature.
through_action: to retire the seed phrase as the price of self-custody
obstacle: reader assumes 'no seed phrase' means custodial — has been trained by ten years of CEXes to equate convenience with surrendering keys
lining: on the surface: a new account type. underneath: the last reason a serious crypto user kept funds on a centralized exchange just disappeared.
reader_prior: crypto self-custody requires seed phrases; anything easier is custodial
not_the_point: feature checklist of what the account supports
